arts.ttl: Mbappé: “This is my first Madrid derby and I hope we can win”
arts.sum: The French striker, who has 22 goals to his name this season, gave his thoughts on RM Play Sessions : “It's going to be a great match and it's very important. I'm looking forward to playing and helping the team, and I hope we can win.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "The derby is always a special game"
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti spoke in the press room at Real Madrid City and discussed the matchday 23 LaLiga clash for the Madrid derby which will be played at the Santiago Bernabéu stadium (Saturday, 9 pm CET): “It's a very important match for two teams fighting to win the league. We're in an emergency situation and the team needs the defensive help of the four forwards who have scored more than 60 goals.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti given numerous boosts to depleted Madrid squad
arts.sum: Based on current availability, Real Madrid’s probable starting eleven is: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Tchouaméni, Asencio, Fran García/Mendy; Valverde, Ceballos; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinícius; and Mbappé. For this crucial encounter, Ancelotti will regain five players who were absent from the Copa match : Thibaut Courtois, Lucas Vázquez, Eduardo Camavinga, Kylian Mbappé, and Jude Bellingham .

arts.ttl: Papers: Arsenal defender Saliba is Real Madrid's top summer target
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Antoine Griezmann makes incredible shirt trade for special Pokémon cards
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid star Antoine Griezmann has gone viral for swapping a match-worn shirt for some rare Pokémon trading cards. Griezmann: Football's biggest trading card fan

arts.ttl: Real Madrid include two new names on Champions League squad list
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have drafted a pair of youngsters into the club’s Champions League A list for the 2nd half of the campaign. This of course comes amid…

arts.ttl: Pedri labels Real Madrid as ‘best shirt swap’ at Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri has opened up on his midfield idols in a superb interview with the club’s media channels. Pedri has returned to full fitness and influence this season, taking his spot in the engine room for club and country, to brilliant effect. The 22-year-old has come full circle in his fitness battle to retake […] The post Pedri labels Real Madrid as ‘best shirt swap’ at Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone plays down refereeing pressure ahead of tense Madrid derby
arts.sum: After Atlético took to social media to respond to Real Madrid’s letter complaining about recent refereeing decisions, Simeone was clear in that his focus was on his team, not the man in the middle. Atlético Madrid coach Diego Simeone looked to play down the pressure on referee César Soto Grado ahead of the Madrid derby against Real Madrid on Saturday, despite a week of building tension in the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Sergio Ramos explains Real Madrid tribute with new jersey number
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Sergio Ramos has confirmed that his jersey number at new club Rayados is a tribute to the Spanish champions. Veteran defender Ramos, for those who may have…

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior in negotiations over MEGA new contract
arts.sum: Real Madrid are currently in negotiations to extend Vinicius Junior ’s contract at the club, according to reports in Spain. “What I've heard, as someone who has direct information from the player, is that he is very happy here and wants to make history at Real Madrid," Ancelotti told reporters.
